copy.bulletinIntro: Hall notes, event calls, raffles & little scroll updates keep the guild lanterns glowing.
copy.doorsIntro: Step through the join path, ranks, leaders & Codex that guide Mōchirīī along its cupcake-sweet cultivation road.
copy.spotlightIntro: A warm shoutout for a guildmate whose care keeps the hall bright, cozy & full of frosting charm.
copy.galleryIntro: Screenshots from runs, quiet roads, lantern-lit detours & small moments that become guild memory.

descriptor: Mōchirīī is a cozy little guild hall for travelers seeking company, events, runs & a soft cupcake-sweet place to rest along the cultivation road.

Step through Discord, follow the joining path & grow at your own pace beneath the lantern glow. Read the event notes, RSVP when plans need shaping & bring a little frosting warmth to the hall as we wander onward together.

seal.title: Guild Seal
verse: Silvered jade softly gleams, where quiet petals fall,
Bamboo stands in patient grace, a guardian to all.
Hearts gather here in gentle light, unhurried, warm & true,
A seal of trust, of shared resolve, where kindred spirits grew.

bulletins.title: Monthly hall meeting to gather, plan & be heard.
Monthly cosmetics raffle for members who keep the table bright.
Leadership roles are open for members ready to carry a lantern with care.

tiles.title: See how presence, care & contribution are recognized.

tiles.label: Leaders
tiles.title: Find the people who answer questions, guide halls & keep the road clear.

spotlight.title: Congratulations to: Meenari.
spotlight.summary: For support & a pretty amazing spark.
